indicators.name: Large windows
indicators.rationale: Large windows allow natural light to enter, reducing the need for artificial lighting.

indicators.name: Red furniture
indicators.rationale: The color red can be stimulating, which might be beneficial for concentration.

indicators.name: Floor tiles
indicators.rationale: Floor tiles are durable and easy to clean, which is practical for a workspace.

indicators.name: Ceiling lights
indicators.rationale: Ceiling lights provide even illumination, which is important for tasks requiring precision.

reasoning_summary: The space is well-suited for computer work (Solo) due to its large windows, red furniture, durable flooring, and good lighting.
